frames.setting: Outdoor residential neighborhood streets in Richmond Hill, Queens; attached row houses with front stoops, iron gates, and parked cars; lush summer foliage; daytime
visual_elements: Location title card overlay: 'RICHMOND HILL, QUEENS / JUNE 2025'
Candidate with clipboard at a doorstep
Older South Asian woman with grey hair and a bindi in a colorful sari-style top
Group of canvassers on the sidewalk near an SUV
Residential brick row houses with decorative iron fencing
frames.presentation_style: Vlog-style campaign documentary with location title cards; handheld, naturalistic footage; focuses on grassroots canvassing activity

frames.setting: Continuation of Richmond Hill streetscape; canvassers walking door-to-door; wide sidewalks, parked vehicles, street-level urban neighborhood; one frame shows the older woman watching a TV screen showing the candidate
visual_elements: Same older South Asian woman canvassing with leaflets
TV screen in background showing candidate speaking
Documentary-style wide shots and close-ups of faces
frames.presentation_style: Observational documentary following a canvasser (the candidate's mother) on the campaign trail; intimate and ground-level perspective

frames.setting: Outdoor park bench / neighborhood setting; woman seated on bench talking; final frames show campaign outro card
visual_elements: Older woman seated outdoors, gesturing while speaking to camera
Green urban park foliage in background
Campaign brand card: 'A NEW ERA / NEW YORK CITY' in red and white on a red background
frames.presentation_style: Personal campaign story told through the mother's perspective; ends with campaign slogan card matching brand identity

summary.dominant_setting: Residential neighborhood streets of Richmond Hill, Queens
text_overlay_types: Location and date title card ('RICHMOND HILL, QUEENS / JUNE 2025')
Campaign slogan outro card ('A NEW ERA for NEW YORK CITY')
